name: North Of Iraq Part 1
short_description: North Of Iraq Part 1 || The pandemic : expands upon the team-based action gameplay that it pioneered . Covid:19 features new maps, characters, weapons, and game modes, and delivers updated versions of the modern content
detailed_description:
The World 2020
Note : The game is based on fiction and does not link it with reality
-----------------------------

The city is full of bad guys who try to kill innocents and spread the virus. Mohammed appears to kill the bad enemies and game is third person shooter game
Now featuring additional Story Mode content and a fully-featured
The pandemic also includes access to the Online
The pandemic for PC , the ability to run high-end display setups with More than 2K resolution and beyond, faster frame rates and more
This Game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work
